nasb.text: The sons of Israel shall camp, each man by his own camp, and each man by his own standard, according to their armies.

esv.text: The people of Israel shall pitch their tents by their companies, each man in his own camp and each man by his own standard.

cnv.text: 以色列人安營，要依照他們的隊伍，各歸本營，各歸本旗。

ccb.text: 以色列人要按照他们的队伍各自扎营，各归本旗。
